description: Hadith knowledge, attribution, chains, and Islamic sciences of hadith

questions.question: State the first hadith in Sahih Bukhari in full with Arabic and English, and explain its meaning.
What are the Five Pillars of Islam according to the well-known hadith? State it fully with source.
State the Hadith of Jibreel (Gabriel) in full — about Islam, Iman, and Ihsan. Give Arabic and source.
What did the Prophet ﷺ say about the best of people? Cite the exact hadith with grade.
What is the hadith about the importance of seeking knowledge? Give Arabic, source, and grade.
State the hadith about the rights of a Muslim upon another Muslim. Give Arabic and source.
What did the Prophet ﷺ say about the virtue of Surah Al-Fatiha? Cite the hadith with grade.
What is the hadith about the mercy of Allah? State the one about 100 parts of mercy.
What did the Prophet ﷺ say about honoring the mother? Cite the exact hadith 3 times about mother.
State the Arba'een (40 Hadith) by Imam Nawawi — give the first 5 hadiths with Arabic and sources.
What did the Prophet ﷺ say about backbiting (ghibah)? Cite the exact hadith.
What is the hadith about the virtue of sending salawat on the Prophet ﷺ? Give Arabic and source.
What did the Prophet ﷺ say about the prohibition of anger? State the hadith in full.
What is the hadith about good character (akhlaq)? State the most comprehensive one.
What did the Prophet ﷺ say about the signs of a hypocrite (munafiq)? Give the exact hadith.
What is the hadith about the superiority of the Arabic language? Verify if this is authentic.
State the hadith about the virtue of dhikr (remembrance of Allah). Give Arabic and source.
What did the Prophet ﷺ say about the reward of praying in congregation (jama'ah)?
What is the hadith about the importance of truthfulness (sidq)? Give Arabic and source.
What did the Prophet ﷺ say about avoiding what is doubtful (shubuhaat)? State the complete hadith.
